# Evidence Pack — One-Pager

**Version:** 2026-04-20 · draft · water-utility variant
**Format target:** single-page PDF, Malkan Solutions LLC brand (cyan `#0AA2C0` on white, Inter + Poppins + JetBrains Mono).
**Primary audience:** water utility general manager, operations director, or board-facing CFO. Secondary: MSSP channel partner forwarding to same.

> Copy below is the canonical text. Designer or Pearl adapts into the single-page PDF layout. Do not shorten the grant-eligibility block — that is the load-bearing element for cold outreach.

---

## Headline

**Evidence Pack — defensible OT cyber evidence in one week, for $7,500.**

## Subhead

When your insurer, your auditor, or your board asks what's exposed on your plant floor this quarter — answer with a redacted 10-page evidence pack mapped to EPA AWIA, CISA CPGs, and your state SRF cyber set-aside. No active probing. No production touch. One week.

## The job this does

Water utilities in 2026 face three asks that arrive faster than a full assessment can be procured:

- **Insurer renewal questionnaires** demanding documented OT posture
- **EPA AWIA 5-year RRA cycles** and state compliance letters
- **Board and rate-case questions** about cyber spending defensibility

Each ask typically triggers a $35k–$150k engagement quote, 3–8 weeks of calendar time, and an internal budget scramble. **Evidence Pack is a one-week, $7,500, grant-eligible alternative** that closes the documentation gap without committing to a long engagement.

## What you get

- **10-page redacted PDF report** with prioritized findings
- **Regulatory cross-reference** to EPA AWIA RRA, CISA Cross-Sector Cybersecurity Performance Goals (CPGs), and CIRCIA notification triggers
- **30-day hosted dashboard** access for your security lead, ops director, and insurer contact
- **Evidence archive with SHA-256 integrity hash** — auditor-grade chain-of-custody
- **Grant-eligibility framing language** you can paste into your SRF Intended Use Plan application

Optional add-ons: multi-site, MSSP white-label, expedited 3-day turn.

## What it is — and what it isn't

- **Passive only.** No active probing. No credential testing. No network-visible traffic to your plant.
- Built from your asset inventory, code repositories, and SBOMs — not from a live scan of your PLCs.
- Safety Instrumented Systems and safety-critical PLCs are **categorically excluded from any touch**, by design.
- Active validation of attack paths is a separate, gated offering (Proven Pathways, T3) requiring full insurance certificates and an Authorization Letter.

## How it's funded

Buyers typically fund Evidence Pack from one of:

- **EPA CWSRF / DWSRF cyber set-asides** — state-administered; your SRF Intended Use Plan window is usually 2–3 weeks
- **IIJA / BIL cyber grants** routed through your state cybersecurity office
- **CISA State and Local Cybersecurity Grant Program (SLCGP)** — for qualifying local governments
- **Operating-budget "regulatory compliance"** or "emergency response planning" line items
- **Insurance-premium offset** — carriers increasingly discount 15–25% for documented OT evidence; on a $75k annual premium that's $11k–$19k back per year
- **MSSP channel pass-through** on your existing Master Services Agreement

Malkan will supply grant-eligibility framing language on request at no charge.

## Why this, why now

- EPA's October 2025 SRF cybersecurity guidance explicitly endorses assessment and documentation activities as eligible uses
- CISA CPGs (v1.0.1) give utilities an explicit evaluation grid; Evidence Pack findings map to the grid
- Insurance loading on undocumented OT posture is rising; insurers increasingly ask for evidence at renewal, not policy-inception only
- Regional peers that received EPA enforcement letters in 2024–2025 cite $50k–$150k in remediation + legal + emergency response costs — documentation closes the gap before the letter arrives

## What the week looks like

| Day | Activity |
|---|---|
| 0 | Sign SOW, complete 45-minute intake, 40% payment |
| 1 | Kickoff call; secure channel opened for inventory exchange |
| 2–3 | Passive recon, secrets scan, supply-chain scan |
| 3 | Optional mid-week findings preview |
| 4–5 | Analysis, regulatory cross-reference, redaction, drafting |
| 6 | Internal QA |
| 7 | Deliver: PDF + dashboard + evidence archive; 60% payment |

## The firm

Malkan Solutions LLC is an OT assessment practice focused on water and mid-industrial manufacturers. Work is delivered using the `otsniff` toolchain — passive-only scanners, deterministic evidence hashing, redaction built into capture. Every finding is traceable to a hashed artifact. Nothing is emitted to your network that wasn't authorized in writing.

Malkan works parallel with OT-practice MSSPs in the Dragos, Claroty, and Nozomi partner networks. MSSP channel pricing and white-label available.

### Back-page teaser (optional, use only if single-page layout permits a band at bottom)

**Top findings most often seen in one-week water-utility Evidence Packs:**

- Secret material (API keys, device passwords) checked into public or semi-public repositories — routinely found in 60–80% of utilities with custom SCADA integrations
- OT vendor firmware with known CVEs absent from Client's CVE scoring because the vendor advisory wasn't ingested
- Supply-chain dependencies with known-compromised upstream packages — elevated risk when vendor integrator portals are in scope
- IT-side remote-access pathways (VPN, vendor jump hosts) terminating in OT without the DMZ buffer the network diagram implies

*Findings vary by site. Numbers above are directional, drawn from aggregate industry reporting; Evidence Pack reports findings specific to your environment.*

---

### Template notes (delete before sending)

- Single-page PDF is the distribution format. Markdown is the canonical source for copy updates.
- Do not localize dollar figures or grant names without re-verifying the state-specific program. SRF program names are federally consistent; IIJA cyber grant flow is state-administered and name-varies.
- Numbers in the back-page teaser are approximate industry directional; do not state a specific customer in any example or aggregate figure.
- $7,500 anchor confirmed by sponsor 2026-04-20. If sponsor reprices T1 later, update this file and all derivative PDFs in one change.
- Water-utility variant only. Oil & Gas / Food / Pharma / Medical Manufacturing variants are parked this quarter; do not repurpose by find-and-replace.
